data.title: Dove and Crumbl are launching a limited-edition collection in Canada exclusively on National Cookie Day at Walmart.ca. Expansion to Walmart stores nationwide starts on Jan 14, 2026.
data.description: In Toronto, Dove and Crumbl have announced a highly anticipated collaboration being brought to Canada. The NEW limited-edition Dove x Crumbl collection is now available exclusively at Walmart.ca starting today, coinciding with National Cookie Day, due to significant demand. The collection will be released in Walmart stores across the country from January 14, 2026. This partnership introduces a range of personal care items inspired by the irr. Get your hands on these products to satiate your skin’s sweet tooth.

data.title: Upbound Group, Inc. declares $0.39 quarterly cash dividend for Q1 2026, payable on Jan 6 to stockholders.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.39 for Q1 2026. This dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, will be disbursed on January 6, 2026, to common stockholders recorded at the close of business. Upbound is a prominent provider of financial solutions targeting underserved consumers, focusing on their changing needs.

data.title: Pet Valu's Companions for Change™ initiatives raised over $4.3 million by 2025, aiding various causes like emergency relief & animal shelters.
data.description: A charitable program is providing support for various causes, including emergency relief, significant capital projects, Dog Guides, and community animal shelters. The program aims to assist in addressing pressing needs by offering financial aid for emergency situations, funding important infrastructure developments, aiding in the training and placement of Dog Guides to help individuals with disabilities, and supporting local animal shelters in the community. This philanthropic initiative highlights its commitment to making a difference by contributing to these vital areas, with a focus on improving overall well-being and welfare.

data.title: Canopy Growth launches Claybourne Gassers vapes in Canada, featuring liquid diamonds to expand in high-growth vape segment.
data.description: In Smiths Falls, Ontario, Canopy Growth Corporation (TSX: WEED) (Nasdaq: CGC) has unveiled the nationwide release of Claybourne Gassers, a fresh range of All-in-One (AIO) vapes with liquid diamonds. This launch signifies Claybourne's initiation into Canada's vape sector, expanding its dominance in potent infused products. The Claybourne Gassers launch is a move by Canopy Growth to diversify its offerings and tap into the growing vape market.

data.title: ICE re-appointed by UK DESNZ to host UK Emissions Trading Scheme auctions through 2028. 2026 auction calendar published.
data.description: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), a prominent global technology and data provider renowned for its highly liquid energy and environmental markets, has revealed that the UK Department for Energy Security & Net Zero (DESNZ) has selected ICE to oversee UK Allowance (UKA) auctions for the UK's Emissions Trading Scheme (ETS) until 2028. ICE has also released the 2026 UKA auction schedule, which can be accessed at www.ice.com/emissions/auctions/uk-emission-al.

data.title: Deep Fission to place small modular reactors in Kansas, groundbreaking on Dec 9, 2025 at Great Plains Industrial Park.
data.description: A company known as Deep Fission, specializing in advanced nuclear energy solutions, has chosen the Great Plains Industrial Park in Parsons, Kansas, as the location for its upcoming advanced reactor pilot project. The project involves placing small modular pressurized water reactors in boreholes dug one mile underground. To celebrate this development, Deep Fission will hold a groundbreaking ceremony on Tuesday, December 9, 2025. This marks a crucial step forward for the Company's initial endeavors in this innovative energy sector.

data.title: Albireo Energy hires Brad Freeman as Senior Vice President of M&A to drive acquisitions.
data.description: Albireo Energy, based in Edison, NJ, has appointed Brad Freeman as the Senior Vice President of Mergers and Acquisitions. As a Huron Capital portfolio company, Albireo Energy specializes in building controls and energy services. Freeman will be responsible for spearheading the company's M&A strategy, focusing on identifying compatible partner organizations and managing the thorough due diligence process with Huron Capital. Additionally, he will oversee the negotiation, finalization, and integration of new acquisitions. This move is aimed at bolstering Albireo Energy's growth, with Freeman playing a critical role in expanding their portfolio through strategic acquisitions.

data.title: BDR to offer Q1 2026 BDRU classes for home service contractors in Seattle on Dec. 4, 2025. Grow sales, marketing, and more.
data.description: In the near future, a series of courses will offer business owners practical techniques to enhance their teams and drive growth in key areas such as sales, marketing, financials, and service delivery. Set to occur in Seattle on December 4, 2025, Business Development Resources (BDR) will be providing these training sessions.

data.title: Constellation Cold Logistics acquires Spedition Wohlert and Wohlert Kühl Logistik in Germany, entering the market.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Constellation Cold Logistics revealed that it has finalized a deal to purchase Spedition Wohlert and Wohlert Kühl Logistik in Germany. Constellation is a prominent company offering cold-storage and temperature-controlled logistics services. The acquisition of these German companies signifies a significant move for Constellation in expanding its operations.

data.title: Market rallies with Tesla and Robinhood leading, but Snowflake falls on earnings outlook. Dow Jones Futures impacted.
data.description: On Wednesday, the market experienced a significant rally with a strong performance from Tesla and Robinhood. However, Snowflake saw a decline following its earnings projection. The Dow Jones Futures reported that Snowflake's outlook led to a decrease after a widespread surge driven by Tesla and Robinhood. This news highlights the fluctuations in the market, with notable movements in key companies.

data.title: UMC collaborates with Polar Semiconductor in the US for 8-inch wafer production, focusing on key industries.
data.description: United Microelectronics Corporation (UMC) recently announced a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Polar Semiconductor to potentially collaborate on scalable 8-inch wafer production in the United States. The partnership would focus on U.S.-based scalable 8-inch wafer manufacturing, with the intention of providing high-quality chips essential to various industries such as automotive, data centers, consumer electronics, aerospace, and defense. According to the MOU, selected devices will be manufactured at Polar Semiconductor's expanded 8-inch facility in Minnesota, utilizing UMC's technology expertise and extensive global customer network. The collaboration aims to drive growth, assist in customers' multi-sourcing strategies, and enhance the U.S. 8-inch manufacturing capabilities.

data.title: 400+ global AI and tech leaders gathered at the Tech Basel Miami AI Summit focused on cross-sector transformation.
data.description: On December 3rd, 2025, the Tech Basel Miami AI Summit took place in Miami, attracting over 400 participants. The event was carefully organized to drive innovation in artificial intelligence, finance, healthcare, and national security sectors. Held at the Mayfair, the summit aimed to foster collaboration and spark positive changes across industries.

Vaxil closes non-brokered private placement and updates board.

data.title: Purple Biotech to showcase CAPTN-3 platform at ESMO-IO 2025 Congress, presenting new preclinical data on its anti-tumor activity. Event in London from Dec 10-12.
data.description: Purple Biotech Ltd., a clinical-stage company traded on NASDAQ/TASE as PPBT, unveiled groundbreaking data highlighting the efficacy of its CAPTN-3 platform in combating treatment-resistant cancers. The unique multi-arm design of the platform demonstrated remarkable anti-tumor activity, showcasing its versatility in addressing challenging cases. The Company is set to present these new preclinical findings at the European Society of Medical Oncology Immuno-Oncology 2025 Annual Congress in London, United Kingdom, from December 10–12, 2025.

data.title: BD and ChemoGLO™ partner to expand hazardous drug contamination testing for facilities and labs. Dec. 4, 2025. (NYSE: BDX)
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Franklin Lakes, New Jersey, BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), a prominent worldwide medical technology enterprise listed on the NYSE with the ticker symbol BDX, teamed up with ChemoGLO™, a renowned expert in detecting and decontaminating hazardous drugs. This collaboration has been established with the aim of progressing initiatives related to hazardous drug safety.

data.title: Dollar General's Q3 2025 results: Net sales $10.6B, Same-Store Sales up 2.5%, Operating Profit $425.9M, EPS $1.28. Dividend $0.
data.description: In Goodlettsville, Tennessee, Dollar General Corporation (NYSE: DG) released its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025, covering a 13-week period ending on October 31, 2025. The company reported a 4.6% increase in net sales, totaling $10.6 billion, with same-store sales also rising by 2.5%. Operating profit saw a significant boost of 31.5% to $425.9 million, while diluted earnings per share (“EPS”) surged by 43.8% to $1.28. Year-to-date cash flows from operations were up by 28.4% to $2.8 billion. Furthermore, the Board of Directors announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.
